title: High Energy Density Science Center
description: The High Energy Density Science (HEDS) Center at Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory (LLNL) advances research on matter and energy in extreme conditions through collaboration, educational programs, access to experimental resources, and opportunities for early-career scientists. HEDS supports LLNL's nuclear deterrence mission, delivering insights essential for national security while fostering scientific innovation.
text:
The High Energy Density Science (HEDS) Center at Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory (LLNL) fosters collaborations aimed at enhancing research on matter and energy under extreme conditions.
The center facilitates opportunities for scientists and engineers to access world-class experimental resources and engage in collaborative explorations in this rapidly evolving field. Together with our partners, we:
